feed.title: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, Claude Skills Hub, and Glama (blog + release notes)

entry.title: claudepress
entry.content: Universal WordPress/WooCommerce starter kit with an interactive setup skill, security-first hooks and Opus 4.8 agents.

entry.title: skills
entry.content: Antoine's personal Claude Code skills — worktree management, shipping, signin, comment cleanup

entry.title: ziwei-doushu
entry.content: 紫微斗數 (Purple Star Astrology) skill for Claude Code — chart calculation, 解盤 reading methodology, 飛化 analysis, and 14 主星 × 12 宮位 × 四化 interpretation. Emphasis on practical reading over rote chart computation.

entry.title: claude-conductor
entry.content: Drive Claude Code sessions in tmux — local and remote (ssh). Launch, prompt, set goals, auto-drive approval gates, capture buffers, read on-disk transcripts, and hand off work between machines.

entry.title: open-placeholder
entry.content: Use Open Placeholder for placeholder images in generated pages, mockups, prototypes, docs, and frontend code.

entry.title: qmd-ja
entry.content: Japanese-enhanced fork of qmd — Vaporetto WASM morphological tokenizer for accurate Japanese BM25 full-text search.

entry.title: stark-plan
entry.content: Turn a design doc into a phased implementation plan, then decompose it into phased GitHub issues with story points and risk labels. Maps to spec-kit's plan + tasks phases.

entry.title: hubspot
entry.content: HubSpot CRM administration via natural language — specialist sub-agents, human-in-the-loop write approval, and a warm-client daemon.

entry.title: zcode-codex-leader
entry.content: Force Claude Code into leader-only mode. Hard PreToolUse gate blocks direct edits, commands, source-code Read, and WebSearch/WebFetch; all code generation, code understanding, visual understanding, web research, image generation, and MCP tool work is dispatched through codex_bridge.ts. SessionStart injects the leader constitution and Stop enforces Plugin evidence.

entry.title: stark-analyze
entry.content: Multi-domain review and adversarial red-team of designs, execution plans, and PRs, multi-agent Terraform/Terragrunt (IaC) review, plus review-prompt improvement from assessment feedback. Maps to spec-kit's analyze phase.

entry.title: okmethod
entry.content: 開発プロセス別のナレッジ（心得シリーズ）をベースに、相談・レビューを行うスキル集

entry.title: fetch-tw-earnings-call
entry.content: Download Taiwan-listed companies' earnings-call (法說會) presentations and transcripts (Chinese + English) by stock id. Fetches directly from authoritative sources — company IR sites and the 公開資訊觀測站 (MOPS) public listing endpoint — then merges and md5-dedupes across sources. Free for noncommercial use (PolyForm Noncommercial 1.0.0); commercial use requires a paid license (see COMMERCIAL-LICENSE.md).

entry.title: dotnet-quality
entry.content: .NET development quality toolkit — TDD workflow, CI failure diagnosis, and auto-formatting hook.

entry.title: pm-toolkit
entry.content: PM utility skills: resume review, NDA drafting, privacy policy generation, and grammar/flow checking. Essential tools for product managers beyond core product work.

entry.title: pr-feedback-sweep
entry.content: Scan open PRs for unresolved review feedback and dispatch fix agents. Works with any GitHub repository.

entry.title: investigation-ontology
entry.content: 反舞弊调查全流程技能包 — 调查哲学方法论、舞弊类型与调查方案、证据链与底稿管理、访谈笔录分析、写作技巧、审计技术、流程分析、结果可视化

entry.title: decentpowers
entry.content: Lean, pragmatic workflow skills for Claude Code: brainstorm to an approved design, one detailed spec, single-agent build, deterministic verify.

entry.title: analyst-kit
entry.content: Hedge-fund-grade equity research for Claude. Forensic single-stock deep dives, thematic value-chain mapping, technical analysis with entry/exit levels, multi-page company-research wikis, and financial models — backed by US (SEC/FMP), global, and Taiwan (FinMind/TWSE) data, with charting and reporting. Ships a research-auditor subagent that fact-checks every deliverable for hallucinations and data errors before it reaches you, and a SessionStart hook that runs the runtime (onboarding, update check, telemetry).

entry.title: adr
entry.content: Architecture Decision Record (ADR) and Domain Decision Record (DDR) generator with structured templates.

entry.title: aiops
entry.content: Router, alignment, planning, and delivery hard gates for agent-assisted development

entry.title: aspire-bisect
entry.content: Bisect .NET Aspire NuGet daily builds to pinpoint regressions. Uses git worktrees, adaptive sampling, and DCP log collection.

entry.title: stark-implement
entry.content: Autonomously execute a development phase end-to-end — implement, PR, review, fix, merge, release — via a paired lead/wing agent loop. Maps to spec-kit's implement phase.

entry.title: pm-go-to-market
entry.content: Go-to-market skills for PMs: GTM strategy, growth loops, GTM motions, beachhead segments, ideal customer profiles, and competitive intelligence briefs.

entry.title: gerador-conteudo-metodo-atencao
entry.content: Geracao de conteudo da Lilian Cidreira pelo Metodo Atencao Digital. Sincroniza o cerebro (GitHub) no Passo 0 antes de gerar.

entry.title: qa-agent
entry.content: QA agent for automated dashboard testing via Playwright — screenshots, health checks, error detection

entry.title: datanorge
entry.content: Finn og hent norske offentlige data fra data.norge.no, rett fra Claude Code. MCP-server + /finn-datakilde-skill som leter iterativt i Felles datakatalog og alltid henter fram lisens- og krediteringskrav.

entry.title: code-guards
entry.content: Protective hooks that block editing of environment files, generated code, and lock files. Includes shell script linting.

entry.title: spec-workflow-mcp-with-dashboard
entry.content: MCP server with auto-started dashboard for structured spec-driven development.

entry.title: yasunori0418-skills
entry.content: AI agent skills (Claude Code / Codex) following the agentskills.io standard.

entry.title: agent-harness
entry.content: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques

entry.title: pm-data-analytics
entry.content: Data analytics skills for PMs: SQL query generation and cohort analysis. Analyze user data, generate queries, and identify retention patterns.

entry.title: gigadump
entry.content: Self-organizing idea dump for Claude Code. /gigadump-idea captures an idea, files it into a coherent folder tree, and maintains INDEX.md; /gigadump-organize tidies and restructures the tree. All in-session — no GitHub Actions, no API keys.

entry.title: paperjury
entry.content: Pre-submission AI review and editing for CS-conference papers: direct-edit LaTeX or Markdown (Word via one-time extraction), run an adversarial multi-agent courtroom review with consensus-gated revisions, or run it unattended toward a goal.

entry.title: memory
entry.content: Slash commands + auto-capture hooks bridging Claude Code to AstraMemory. Provider selector routes between local and SaaS backends. Bun-native TypeScript CLI. Fail-silent ingest log. Bearer scrubbing at every output sink.

entry.title: backtester-agent
entry.content: Sentinel backtest runner — pure executor that reads backtest issue specs from GitHub, resolves the symbol universe, runs the test (locally or on EC2 spot), posts results back to the issue, and logs them. Does NOT interpret results or make recommendations — the engineering session owns that.

entry.title: tmux-message-bus
entry.content: Claude Code adapter for tmux-message-bus: durable cross-window/session messaging. SessionStart register hook + Stop-hook drain (decision:block injection) + send-keys doorbell, on top of the agent-agnostic core bus.

entry.title: merge-to-main-plugin
entry.content: Helps merge feature branches into main safely

entry.title: memory-map
entry.content: Visualiza as memórias do Claude Code (CLAUDE.md global, CLAUDE.md do projeto e MEMORY.md) como um mapa mental interativo servido em localhost.

entry.title: llm-wiki-skills
entry.content: Bundle — installs every LLM Wiki skill at once (wiki-doc-author + sop-to-spec + skill-author).

entry.title: morethemes
entry.content: Use morethemes' public API for matplotlib themes.

entry.title: cc-tabs
entry.content: Records the Claude Code session id for the current iTerm2 tab (keyed by $CC_TAB) so the cc_tabs daemon can resume it after a reboot.

entry.title: yggdrasil
entry.content: One shared, durable memory for your AI coding agents — local-first, zero-dependency. Decisions, lessons and status persist across sessions, tools and projects.

entry.title: web-quality
entry.content: TypeScript/JavaScript quality hooks — auto-lint, type-check, and test runner.

entry.title: fak
entry.content: Adjudicate every tool call like a syscall. fak's MCP server exposes capability-gated adjudication verbs so Claude Code can screen a proposed tool call, run one through the kernel, or quarantine a tool result before it enters context.

entry.title: pm-product-strategy
entry.content: Product strategy skills for PMs: vision, strategy canvas, value propositions, lean canvas, business model canvas, SWOT, PESTLE, Ansoff Matrix, Porter's Five Forces, and monetization.

entry.title: pm-product-discovery
entry.content: Product discovery skills for PMs: ideation, experiments, assumption testing, feature prioritization, customer interview synthesis, and Voice of Customer analysis across Jira, Slack, and NPS.

entry.title: python-skills
entry.content: Opinionated skills for scaffolding Python projects with an Astral-centric toolchain (uv, ruff, ty), pre-commit, Renovate, CI and Docker.

entry.title: frontend-agent
entry.content: Sentinel frontend/dashboard agent — owns React components, WS connections, nginx proxy, and dashboard UX

entry.title: work-triage
entry.content: Triage open PRs and issues after completing epics — identify abandoned, superseded, or stale work items and recommend close/update/keep

entry.title: pm-market-research
entry.content: Market research skills for PMs: user personas, market segmentation, sentiment analysis, competitive analysis, user research synthesis, and research-library search across Google Drive.

entry.title: bharats-claude-toolkit
entry.content: Bharat's personal Claude Code setup, packaged as a plugin + marketplace: 116 vendored skills and 4 agents spanning engineering, AI, product, design, copy/UX, go-to-market, marketing, and enterprise & ops, plus a curated always-on plugin tier and an on-demand firehose one command away.

entry.title: rebeca-elmudesi
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for Rebeca Elmudesi — branded presentations and documents about her art via stromy-format, plus self-service website and brand asset editing via asset-broker

entry.title: token-optimizer
entry.content: Audit, fix, and monitor Claude Code context window usage. Find the ghost tokens.

entry.title: scott-cc
entry.content: Core development tools with 4 commands, 8 AI agents, 17 skills, 3 hooks, and 3 templates for productive modern web development

entry.title: ltspice-mcp
entry.content: LTspice/ngspice circuit simulation with structured results — including per-device operating points (gm/gds/vth) read back by name, no rawfile parsing — plus LTspice .asc schematic editing, exposed as MCP tools. Tracks the latest ltspice-mcp release on PyPI.

entry.title: unifable
entry.content: A harness that makes Opus (or any Claude/Codex model) behave like Fable: completion, evidence, and verification enforced as procedure, auto-routed per task. Native plugin on Claude Code and Codex (hooks self-contained). Fork of fivetaku/fablize.

entry.title: daily-hotspots
entry.content: 每日前沿商业机会雷达: 多源采集→分类评分→跨日去重→Discord 分级推送+私有归档. Triggers: 每日热点, 前沿商业机会, daily opportunity, daily hotspots.

entry.title: box-rclone-binder
entry.content: Bind one Box drive across multiple servers via rclone with non-expiring server auth; idempotent deploy, health-check self-heal, cron, and Discord alerts.

entry.title: demand-mining
entry.content: 已发布产品每日用户需求挖掘+竞品/热点追踪+EOD 头脑风暴+RICE/Kano 量化迭代排序. Triggers: 需求挖掘, demand mining, 迭代建议, EOD 汇总.

entry.title: aicoach-framework
entry.content: Multi-agent AI coach for endurance & strength athletes — runs entirely inside Claude Code.

entry.title: obsidian-vault-autopilot
entry.content: AI-powered vault autopilot — sorts, renames, tags, and enriches your Obsidian notes automatically.

entry.title: quiver
entry.content: Composable development lifecycle -- brainstorm, plan, execute, review, and hand over from idea to merged PR

entry.title: sherpa
entry.content: Develop like a sherpa: an opt-in Discover->Analyze->Plan->Execute->Validate workflow as /plan, /execute, and /workflow skills, with bundled scout/review/build subagents. Plans the route, ropes up, checks the rope at every pitch, leaves cairns to resume. Project-agnostic; extend with project packs + a configurable state directory.

entry.title: duke-strategies
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for Duke Strategies branded deliverables

entry.title: pyright-lsp-python
entry.content: Python LSP integration with Pyright for AI-assisted code navigation

entry.title: forge
entry.content: A stage-by-stage workflow skill set (fg-*). A development loop that takes one task through a single cycle of ask·plan → execute → retro → done. Consists of fg-ask (inquiry/triage + grill-with-docs-style conversational grilling), fg-run (backlog selection menu · Run all, Dynamic Workflow execution), fg-learn (retro · doc promotion), and fg-done (done · seal · re-run guard), plus fg-map — an on-demand utility outside the loop that maps the codebase into .forge/codebase/ with parallel subagents so grilling reads a map instead of re-exploring the code (cuts context rot), and fg-quick — a lightweight lane outside the loop for trivial tasks that still grills lightly but skips formal artifacts (no ADR/plan/retro), records one line to .forge/quick/LOG.md, runs directly, and bails to fg-ask if the task turns out non-trivial, fg-status — a read-only reporter that surveys .forge/ and prints where every task stands plus the single next step you need (writes nothing, never auto-runs), fg-next — derives that same next step and runs it, announcing the step then invoking the skill rather than only reporting it (one-shot; fg-status reports, fg-next acts), with an 'all' mode (fg-next all) that drives backlog tasks to completion until empty, auto-progressing mechanical steps and halting at conversational walls, and fg-tdd — toggles persistent TDD mode in .forge/config.json (fg-ask then defaults to asking, fg-run runs test-first), and fg-eco — toggles eco mode in .forge/config.json (when on it activates loop-wide efficiency: fg-run caps its delegated workflow subagents at sonnet — lower only, the session model is untouched — and the embedded Eco laziness-first discipline in skills/fg-eco/ECO.md (code simplicity plus terse-communication output, caveman-derived) is injected into fg-run subagents, woven into fg-ask grilling as a YAGNI lens, and adopted by the current session — ADR-0014), and fg-loop — a goal-driven momentum loop with bounded replan: an initial conversational inquiry pins a machine-verifiable stop condition, an authorized fix-forward replan scope, and a replan cap (default 3 rounds) into .forge/loop.md, then it drives tasks unattended (run → UAT → auto-skip retro → seal, auto-selecting recommended defaults at every soft decision and asking the user nothing) until the checks pass, generating in-scope fix-forward tasks within the cap and halting only at the walls (unverifiable UAT, genuine fork, cap exhausted, no progress, check-tension oscillation, safety/irreversible action — ADR-0016). On a non-default git branch the whole forge state moves under .forge/branch/<branch>/ (git-tracked, namespaced so parallel branches never collide on .forge state — ADR-0011), and fg-merge — an outside-the-loop utility that, after you git merge a branch, integrates that branch's .forge/branch/<branch>/ into .forge/ (renumbering ADRs and rewriting cross-references, merging CONTEXT terms, folding done history, removing the branch folder; halts on genuine conflicts), and fg-cleanup — an outside-the-loop utility that retires stale or superseded ADRs to .forge/adr/retired/ on your approval, keeping the active decision set current without deleting the why (ADR-0012), and fg-statusline — an outside-the-loop setup utility that installs a bash fragment script reading .forge/ and wires it into settings.json so your terminal statusline shows the current loop progress (active task·stage, goal-loop indicator, or backlog count); since Claude Code allows only one statusLine it auto-wraps your existing one as an extra row rather than replacing it (ADR-0017), and fg-adversarial-review — an outside-the-loop utility that runs an optional adversarial review between fg-run and fg-learn: it assumes the result is wrong and fans out six lenses (failure points, hidden assumptions, misread requirements, security/performance/data-loss, unexpected misuse, weak decisions) as parallel workflow subagents, records findings to .forge/review.md, and on your approval turns fix-needed findings into a fix-forward plan to run again — optional, never a seal gate, always auto-skipped in unattended drives (ADR-0018), and fg-doctor — a read-only integrity health check (outside the loop) that surveys the .forge/ state contract and the docs/manifests and reports inconsistencies with a severity and an actionable fix hint each (orphaned run.md, broken/missing STATUS fields, slug-pairing mismatches, half-sealed done/, manifest version drift across the 3 places, README bilingual drift, skills missing from CLAUDE.md); it writes nothing and never auto-fixes — fg-status reports where you are, fg-doctor reports whether the state is healthy (ADR-0019), and fg-drop — an outside-the-loop utility that discards incomplete work you no longer want (a backlog plan, the active slot, an awaiting-retro task in executed/, or a halted goal loop): it lists the items with a per-item risk level (a checkbox dialog for ≤4, a numbered text list for ≥5), then a separate question to hard-delete (default, no trace) or archive to .forge/dropped/, behind a confirmation gate that warns already-run code is not reverted; it removes forge state only — never git, never your code — and a halted goal loop is dropped whole with its member tasks excluded from individual drop (ADR-0021), and fg-agents — an outside-the-loop utility that generates a project's domain agents by conversational grilling (outside any workflow): it derives the recurring, separable roles in the project and writes standard Claude Code subagent cards to .claude/agents/<role>.md, each description carrying a 'when to use' so fg-run can dispatch a matching role as agentType; the cards load at session start so they take effect only after a restart, and the whole path is graceful — a project with no domain agents runs exactly as before (ADR-0024). Use in contexts like 'start a new task', 'start with forge', 'let's work on this', 'refine the plan', 'map the codebase', 'forge quick', 'forge status', 'forge next', 'forge loop', 'forge tdd', 'forge eco', 'forge merge', 'forge cleanup', 'forge statusline', 'adversarial review', '적대적 리뷰', 'forge doctor', '무결성 검사', '상태 점검', 'forge drop', '작업 버리기', '계획 지워', 'forge agents', '도메인 에이전트 만들어', 'create project agents'.

entry.title: schedule-reminder
entry.content: Persistent store for todos, events, deadlines and progress with pending/doing/done states; fires due reminders via Discord; stable CLI/JSON API other skills call.

entry.title: loop-builder
entry.content: Design and scaffold self-running agent loops, and file feedback as GitHub issues under your own account.

entry.title: ffmpeg-llm
entry.content: Helps Claude Code generate accurate, efficient FFmpeg commands from natural-language descriptions.

entry.title: phased-dev
entry.content: Agent-driven phased development workflow built on a scope abstraction. Each scope declares its own pipeline; every pipeline opens with a research phase (prior art, feasibility, domain constraints) feeding the phases that follow. Shipped pipelines cover standard projects (research → brainstorm → engineering → plan → implement), design-heavy projects (research → brainstorm → ux → engineering → plan → implement, with full design language / component inventory / a11y contract), standard features (research → engineering → plan → implement), and design-heavy features (research → ux → engineering → plan → implement, for UX-led features like onboarding rewrites or editor modes). Bundles 10 unified slash commands (including rewind-phase and generate-ux-preview), role-separated subagents, per-task completion markers, per-feature status mirrors, and templates with phase gates and per-task execution logs.

entry.title: citevahti
entry.content: CiteVahti — citation integrity for manuscripts. Human-first blinded claim verification with PubMed, decision-gated Zotero write-back, and a hash-chained audit trail; plus an AI-assisted drafting skill that writes only from verified claims.

entry.title: t3
entry.content: Personal code factory for multi-repo projects

entry.title: phovia
entry.content: Phovia memory hooks and local MCP search for Claude Code, with device login.

entry.title: yana-ai
entry.content: Personal agent operating system for Claude Code. Safety hooks, memory tiers, agents, commands, and cross-engine hard enforcement.

entry.title: agency
entry.content: Harness-in-harness agency engine: code-mode capabilities (macroskills) over one provenance graph.

entry.title: auto-claude-skills
entry.content: Enables agentic PDLC in Claude Code with phase-aware skill routing, guardrails, and workflow state recovery

entry.title: design-engineer
entry.content: A Design Engineering Director for coding agents: turns any site or brief into a high-converting, high-retention WOW site via a six-skill pipeline (recon → growth → direction → motion → handoff). Produces a build-ready prompt pack by default, or builds and adversarially reviews sections with --build.

entry.title: juggle
entry.content: Multi-topic conversation orchestrator. Manage parallel conversation threads within a single Claude Code session — discuss one topic while background agents research or build for others.

entry.title: php-modernization
entry.content: PHP 8.x modernization patterns with type safety and PHPStan

entry.title: ibr
entry.content: End-to-end design tool for AI coding agents — guided UI builds, web/iOS/macOS guidance, visual checks, mockup matching, interaction testing, native scanning, native layout-fill / gap analysis

entry.title: tamirs-superpowers
entry.content: 18 bundled skills, 6 specialist agents, smart worktree hooks, statusline, slash commands, and MCP server stubs — plan, implement, review, debug, multi-agent setup, and audit code from one plugin.

entry.title: openquok
entry.content: Openquok CLI skill for the social media scheduling API — integrations, posts, uploads, analytics (JSON output for agents).

entry.title: imagetoolforllm
entry.content: Capture a screenshot, draw labeled regions on it, and hand the image + structured references to your LLM coding agent.

entry.title: rig
entry.content: rig — a LEGO-style harness composer. Compose bricks (facets/patterns/steps/recipes) at invocation time into a task-specific agent harness. Domain-agnostic engine: dev-flow orchestration (review, implement, PR), pluggable packs — sales deal-review, a conversational mode (rig:talk), a goal-driven loop (rig:goal), existing-PR review (rig:pr), and a prose AI-smell remover (de-ai-smell) — plus a --validate doctor, a /rig:init scaffolder, generators for reviewer personas (/rig:persona) and LLM-wiki domain knowledge (/rig:knowledge), a /rig:catalog cross-tier registry, and run-continuity that survives context compaction via a shipped PreCompact hook. Tiered (project/global) personas and a cross-linked knowledge wiki keep domain knowledge shared, not siloed. Claude Code native; no heavy DSL engine.

entry.title: miller
entry.content: Local SQLite-backed code intelligence, content search, and workspace freshness for coding agents.

entry.title: fe-rail
entry.content: Frontend 프로젝트 전용 하네스. spec → build → review → PR 사이클을 자동화. React / Next.js + TypeScript.

entry.title: promotion-assistant
entry.content: Automate multi-channel product promotion (email/posts/forum/DM), track conversion funnel, self-tune via feedback.

entry.title: minime
entry.content: Evidence-based agent orchestration. Four skills (blueprint / replicate / inspect / extract) collapse a brainstorm-plan-code-review pipeline into one tiered human gate, plus a dr-evil agent that drives the flow end-to-end and a frau subagent that runs inspection with full tool access in a fresh context to remove implementation bias. Ships a lab skill that bootstraps the per-repo files into any target repo.

entry.title: telegram-bridge
entry.content: Two-way Telegram bridge for Claude Code: notify when work finishes, and chat with Claude over Telegram while away — every session always listening, coordinated by a file lock so only one polls at a time. No daemon. The same runtime also bridges Codex and opencode (see repo docs).

entry.title: auto-support
entry.content: Answer product Discord questions from public docs only; fail-closed leak guards; escalate the unsure to founders.

entry.title: mcp-terra
entry.content: Run, auto-fix, and explain Terra notebooks & WDL workflows from Claude Code: provision the right-sized VM, execute on it, auto-fix bugs, and email a verified report plus an audio explainer of the results. Credentialed, no-delete, controlled-access-aware.

entry.title: codevista
entry.content: Local, zero-runtime-dependency visual plans and recaps. The agent writes a compact Markdown-superset file; a bundled Node server renders it as a rich, interactive, commentable view in the browser — entirely on 127.0.0.1, no MCP, no network.

entry.title: justdown
entry.content: One library-lookup MCP server over the .jd graph. Search the library by need, fetch a shard as ordered sections, trace its @links — instead of an MCP server per capability. Wraps the jd binary's read verbs (search/get/ls/links/path).

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Universal agentic skill library for Claude Code with 1,254+ reusable skills across coding, security, design, product, and operations workflows.

entry.title: stromy
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for Stromy branded deliverables — composes nl-gov-data intel/analysis + stromy-format rendering + markdown-canvas deliverable planning over Stromy's brand

entry.title: deep-init
entry.content: Generates a grounded, verified, two-tier agent context layer (lean CLAUDE.md + deep .ai/docs) for any codebase, plus report-only issue detection. 100% local, read-only.

entry.title: unleashed-mail
entry.content: Multi-agent development plugin for UnleashedMail — a native macOS 15+ email client supporting Gmail and Microsoft Graph, built with Swift 6, SwiftUI, AppKit, WKWebView, GRDB.swift (SQLCipher), and MVVM architecture. Ships 20 specialized agents, 18 auto-triggering skills, 3 orchestration commands, and a bundled deterministic review-synthesizer MCP server. Aligns agents with project's path-scoped rules (`.claude/rules/`) and defines cross-agent workflow contracts (AGENT_CONTRACTS.md).

entry.title: ro
entry.content: Ronan's personal skills for development workflow, quality, browser/visual, research, audio/media, and project setup. Skills invoke as /ro:<skill-name>.

entry.title: corthos-corthography
entry.content: corthos-corthography — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: canary-guard
entry.content: Output-integrity canary: the model ends every response with a per-user secret token, and a Stop hook flags its absence (truncation / injection / drift). Absence is the signal — a present token is not an all-clear.

entry.title: badi
entry.content: Workflow management for Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini, Windsurf, AGENTS.md — 30 AI agents, 86 commands, 14 hooks, 63 opt-in skill categories. Built for Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 and Sonnet 4.6.

entry.title: jira
entry.content: Comprehensive Jira integration with auto-detection of issue keys

entry.title: lsp-refactor
entry.content: Project-wide rename, file-move-with-importer-updates, and move-symbol via a real language server. Use this whenever a refactor touches more than one file — Claude Code's built-in LSP tool is READ-ONLY and cannot rename, move files, or move symbols. A text-only edit silently misses re-exports, aliased and type-only imports, and {@link} references; this plugin drives the LSP to catch every one.

entry.title: amaris-consulting
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for Amaris Consulting branded deliverables, brand tools, and strategic deliverable planning

entry.title: claude-skills
entry.content: Personal user-scope Claude Code skills. PKI/ops runbooks: internal-ca (2-tier PKI bootstrap with Vault, OCSP, CRL, Ansible deploy), mtls (server-trusts-client mutual TLS on top of internal-ca), lxd-claude-setup (provision Claude Code on a headless LXD/Linux server). Bare-metal Kubernetes family: k8s-bare-metal (kubeadm + Calico + Longhorn + Rancher, single-node/HA/join, checkpoint-resume), harbor-registry (private Harbor registry with self-signed CA), cicd-platform (Argo CD + self-hosted GitHub Actions runners). MJBL mTLS platform suite (the live deployed ecosystem on this host, indexing the /home/mjbl/* runbooks as source-of-truth): mjbl-mtls-platform, mjbl-ca-operations, mjbl-enrollment-plane, mjbl-client-provisioning, mjbl-cert-lifecycle, mjbl-operator-portal, mjbl-mtls-troubleshooting. Slash commands: /k8s-setup, /harbor-setup, /cicd-setup, and the MJBL suite under /mjbl:mtls:* (platform, ca, enroll, client, cert, portal, troubleshoot, issue-server). MJBL Kubernetes estate suite (the live multi-cluster topology — production rkek8s, the facility/ArgoCD cluster, UAT, and DR — kubeconfigs, MetalLB, ArgoCD external-cluster deploys, and the kubectl-apply DR tooling): mjbl-k8s-platform, mjbl-k8s-production, mjbl-k8s-facility, mjbl-k8s-dr, under /mjbl:k8s:* (platform, prod, facility, dr).

entry.title: agent-factory
entry.content: A Praxis-backed agent factory: a single-agent plan -> execute -> verify loop with compounding memory, delivered as Claude Code skills. Coding-first behind a general task+oracle seam.

entry.title: agentdeals
entry.content: Search and compare free tiers, credits, and pricing changes across 1,500+ developer tools. Find deals for databases, hosting, CI/CD, monitoring, and 50+ categories.

entry.title: track
entry.content: Record-only spec / realization / acceptance system of record. Bundles the read-only track-mcp server (report / query / validate / branch-provenance / freshness) over a project's .track/ event log. Writes stay on the `track` CLI (record-only, append-only, integrity-chained).

entry.title: usap-skills
entry.content: Unified Security Agent Platform — 79 cybersecurity skills + 12 cs-* orchestrator agents that emit a typed 11-field JSON output contract, mapped to MITRE ATT&CK and NIST CSF 2.0. Runs in any LLM. Bundles 7 slash commands (usap:run, usap:fortigate, usap:orchestrate, usap:challenge, usap:compare, usap:test, usap:README) and 6 user-invocable orchestrator skills (Alex, CISO, DevSecOps, Incident Responder, Program Manager, Red Team).

entry.title: cc-native
entry.content: Keep Claude Code feature-aware against weekly releases: feature-guide skill, edit-time reminder + lint + audit for .claude/ artifacts.

entry.title: hephaestus
entry.content: Shared tooling plugin for the HomericIntelligence ecosystem. Ships 23 skills: skill-advisor, advise, learn, myrmidon-swarm, brainstorm, test-driven-development, systematic-debugging, verification, git-worktrees, finish-branch, code-review, repo-analyze, repo-analyze-quick, repo-analyze-strict, repo-analyze-full, repo-analyze-quick-full, repo-analyze-strict-full, review-pr-strict, worktree-cleanup, tidy, create-reusable-utilities, github-actions-python-cicd, and python-repo-modernization.

entry.title: ru-text
entry.content: Russian text quality plugin — typography, information style, editorial standards, UX writing, business correspondence

entry.title: typo3-testing
entry.content: TYPO3 extension testing with automated test generation agents

entry.title: makepad-skills
entry.content: Comprehensive Makepad UI framework assistant with auto-routing, widget patterns, shaders, animations, and production-ready Robius patterns from Robrix/Moly codebases

entry.title: usecase-factory
entry.content: ClawExperts Use-Case Factory for researching AI Agent product ideas and producing a build/pivot/narrow/kill decision.

entry.title: claude-agent-team
entry.content: 在隔离 git worktree 内、走 TDD、通过共享看板协作的五角色 Agent Team（Planner/Coder/Tester/Reviewer/Doc Writer）；复杂任务先用 superpowers brainstorming 确认需求，带覆盖闸门、迭代修复闭环、终局复跑、update-docs 同源文档完善与自动提交；内置完成定义(DoD)、防合理化护栏(Rationalizations/Red Flags)、怀疑驱动评审、ADR 决策记录与机械化测试审计钩子。

entry.title: arc-1
entry.content: SAP ABAP development for Claude Code: bundles the ARC-1 MCP server (read/write/search/activate/lint/diagnose ABAP via the ADT REST API) with best-practice skills for RAP services, CDS modelling, ABAP Unit tests, clean-core audits, and UI5 modernization. Read-only by default; opt-in write gates.

entry.title: y2
entry.content: A minimal Claude plugin written in Python that implements hook handlers and logs all hook invocations.

entry.title: catalyst-by-zoho
entry.content: AI agent skill for Catalyst by Zoho — full-stack serverless cloud platform. Covers all services, SDKs, CLI, architecture patterns, pricing, migration guides, and Zoho MCP tool-based resource management.

entry.title: ralph-wiggum-plugin
entry.content: CLI-agnostic Ralph autonomous development loop with token tracking, context rotation, gutter detection, and Spec Kit support. Drives either the Claude Code or cursor-agent CLI from a terminal-run shell loop.

entry.title: sumup
entry.content: Skills for SumUp payment integrations across terminal and online checkout flows

entry.title: memorylens
entry.content: On-demand .NET memory profiling with concrete code fix suggestions — powered by JetBrains dotMemory

entry.title: dark-factory
entry.content: Commands for writing, auditing, and managing dark-factory specs, prompts, and scenarios

entry.title: cc-safe-setup
entry.content: 734 safety hooks for Claude Code — prevent file deletion, credential leaks, git disasters, and token waste during autonomous AI coding sessions

entry.title: memex-garden
entry.content: Search and save content in your Memex library through the hosted Memex MCP server and bundled memex-agent-skill.

entry.title: stageset
entry.content: Teach Claude to author and operate StageSet resources for the stageset-controller — ordered, gated, multi-stage Flux delivery.

entry.title: fno
entry.content: Set a target. Say f[no] to mostly done.

entry.title: snapper-mcp
entry.content: Connects Claude Code / Claude Desktop to a Snapper trading backend via the /api/mcp endpoint. Ships a watch subcommand that streams live signal + order events as JSONL, auto-wired as a Claude Code plugin monitor sharing the same long-lived AI delegate token as the proxy MCP server.

entry.title: sym-mesh-channel
entry.content: Real-time Claude-to-Claude mesh. Agent-to-agent cognitive signals over Bonjour LAN or WebSocket relay.

entry.title: nl-ez-plugin
entry.content: Branded Claude Code plugin for Ministerie van Economische Zaken en Klimaat (nl-ez). Composes Dutch government data intelligence (nl-gov-data MCP — Tweede Kamer, Rijksoverheid, KOOP, BWB, Wetgevingskalender, Rechtspraak, CBS, plus nl-issue-framing, nl-parliamentary-positioning, nl-policy-legislative-landscape, nl-tensions) with server-side branded document formatting (stromy-format) and markdown-canvas deliverable planning, over the nl-ez client-data brand overlay.

entry.title: skill-concierge
entry.content: A skill-governance layer over Claude Code's default mechanism: semantic retrieval (which skill) + use-enforcement (whether Claude uses one) + a compounding invocation ledger.

entry.title: agent-smith
entry.content: Autonomous development pipeline — auto-configures MCP servers, scaffolds project-aware Claude Code skills, and drives ticket-to-PR workflows

entry.title: vatt-ghern
entry.content: Daily tech news skill for the vatt-ghern public blog (Eleventy + Cloudflare Pages). Drafts one roundup + several deep-story HTML posts per day, opens a PR for review.

entry.title: claude-status-bar
entry.content: Menu bar status indicator for Claude Code: animated spark, elapsed timer, and open/close lifecycle.

entry.title: sig
entry.content: Disciplined AI development workflow integrating GSD's execution orchestration, Agent Skills' quality enforcement, and patterns from the broader Claude Code plugin ecosystem — with a project-complexity calibration router that right-sizes rigor per project tier. Slash-command prefix: /sig:* (Signal is the project brand; sig is the namespace).

entry.title: cc-repete
entry.content: Self-evolving autonomous loops for Claude Code. Ralph-style iteration with an evolving payload, human-gated transitions (or opt-in autonomous mode), context-rot checkpoints, and opt-in TODO_NEXT harvesting + a project lesson library. Reuses the remember plugin for memory.

entry.title: frappe-agent
entry.content: Frappe, ERPNext, and Frappe ecosystem coding, customization, bench, and review intelligence for Claude Code and AI coding workflows.

entry.title: obsidian
entry.content: Create and edit Obsidian vault files including Markdown, Bases, and Canvas. Use when working with .md, .base, or .canvas files in an Obsidian vault.

entry.title: ready-agent-1
entry.content: Ready Agent 1 — is your codebase ready for the agents? Score a repository's agent-readiness (deterministic, cited, Level 1–5) and clear the gates to raise it.

entry.title: brooks-lint
entry.content: AI code reviews grounded in twelve classic engineering books — decay risk diagnostics with book citations, severity labels, and six analysis modes (PR review, architecture audit, tech debt, test quality, health dashboard, full-sweep auto-fix)

entry.title: agent-mail-notifier
entry.content: Alerts agent when new mail arrives via agent-mail-mcp after subagent tasks complete

entry.title: baton
entry.content: Pass the baton. Conduct the fleet. Claude Code as command-and-control for a fleet of coding LLMs — capability routing, cost engine, jobs, decisions, and a knowledge base.

entry.title: squid
entry.content: Opinionated engineering agent team with progressive-disclosure specs for Python / TypeScript / Go monorepos. Ships PA / SWE / Tester / PR Reviewer / On-Call sub-agents, /plan / /implement-task / /implement-night pipelines, and a library of language/framework/infra specs that agents load on-demand.

entry.title: build-loop
entry.content: Multi-phase build orchestration with native debugging: assess, plan, execute, review, iterate. Plan-verify gate on Phase 2. Optional UI design gates. Native debug-loop, debugging-memory, and logging-tracer skills provide root-cause investigation without a bundled MCP server. Orchestrator owns when-to-fire; bundled skills own procedural detail; logging-tracer-bridge is an optional escalation hop to the standalone Coding Debugger supporting plugin for extended capability.

entry.title: forge
entry.content: 개인 전용 AI 에이전트 시스템 — skills·agents·commands 통합. TDD·체계적 디버깅·브레인스토밍·구현 계획·서브에이전트 개발·멀티에이전트 파이프라인·문서 동기화 포함.

entry.title: design-extractor
entry.content: Extract a complete, validated, reusable design system from any URL — patterns, relationships, motion, voice, and a self-validating shadcn/Tailwind HTML replica. Iteratively refines until the replica matches reference screenshots at >=0.85 similarity. Produces a per-brand DESIGN.md and an installable per-brand SKILL.md, indexed in a local design library at ~/.claude/design-library/.

entry.title: zerovibe
entry.content: Создавай приложения с ИИ и публикуй их одной командой на платформе zerovibe: шаблон проекта, дизайн из макета Pencil + чистый CSS, генерация фич, тесты и деплой (install → init → deploy).

entry.title: standaarden
entry.content: CONCEPT — Skills voor Nederlandse overheidsstandaarden (beheerd door Logius): API Design Rules, Digikoppeling, OAuth NL, FSC, Logboek Dataverwerkingen, CloudEvents, BOMOS, E-Government en Publicatie-tooling. Bevat 10 skills voor 77 GitHub repositories verdeeld over 9 domeinen.

entry.title: escapement
entry.content: Host-neutral agentic workflow layer: beads issue tracking, oracle-discipline gates, TDD enforcement, and outcome-bias continuation for Claude Code sessions.

entry.title: voice-control
entry.content: Phone voice remote for your interactive Claude Code session — types your speech into the cmux pane and speaks replies back.

entry.title: ics-calendar
entry.content: Read and write your Mac Calendar (including iCloud) directly from Claude, via Apple's native EventKit framework. No credentials required.

entry.title: lakebase-app-dev-kit
entry.content: Opinionated workflows for agentic software development on paired Lakebase branches: a Spec-First Test-Driven Development (SFTDD) state-machine (role agents + HITL gates), an SCM branch-lifecycle workflow (claim, PR, CI, merge), and a release workflow (promotion across tiers). Every git branch is paired with a Lakebase branch.

entry.title: everything-claude-code
entry.content: Comprehensive agent framework for AI-assisted development

entry.title: vs-token-safer
entry.content: Sits between Claude Code and your codebase and hands back a short file:line list instead of dumping source into the chat. It uses a real language server when it can (clangd / Roslyn / tsserver / pyright), tree-sitter when there's no toolchain, and a fuzzy search built from your repo's own naming when you don't know the exact name (no embeddings). It section-edits Markdown and config files the same way. Everything stays on your machine. No IDE required. Bundles gamedev-log-analyzer for reading huge editor/build logs.

entry.title: printago
entry.content: Claude Code Skill for interacting with the Printago 3D printing management API. Manage parts, printers, print jobs, materials, SKUs, builds, orders, and profiles.

entry.title: matrix-communication
entry.content: Agentic Skills for Matrix: client-side chat (matrix-communication), Synapse homeserver administration (matrix-administration), and structured announcement composition (matrix-announcement). Works with any Matrix/Synapse homeserver.

entry.title: spectra
entry.content: Capture screenshots, videos, and demos across platforms with a tagged library

entry.title: design-skills
entry.content: Personal Claude Code skills for design workflows, design system extraction, GitHub Actions deploy automation, and a Next.js GitHub-backed CMS.

entry.title: promptworld
entry.content: PromptWorld — the meta-compiler *World: a WrightMaster Engineer-CEO that has every skill plus a native subagent per component type (skill / mcp / harness / operating_system / prompt / team / workflow), and 7 PromptGym specialist AIOS agents, that compile / compose / publish prompt systems through the nomicon. Bundles the install-promptworld deploy WIZARD (the agent builds the docker image, boots the container running the Engineer-CEO + PromptGym + the assistant-ui chat / Monaco file explorer / embedded terminal, copies the Claude creds in, and hands the user one URL), compile-a-world (the meta-compiler skill — the nomicon folds on itself), and ingest-into-nomicon-app.

entry.title: loop-engineer
entry.content: Loop engineering wizard for Claude Code. Answer 3 questions and Claude orchestrates a maker/verifier agent loop until your goal is met.

entry.title: adcp-client
entry.content: Adds the /adcp skill for calling AdCP advertising agent tools over MCP or A2A, running protocol compliance scenarios, and querying the AdCP registry. Includes built-in test agents for zero-config use. Backed by the `@adcp/sdk` npm package (formerly `@adcp/client`).

entry.title: pi-stuff
entry.content: pi-stuff — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: sdna
entry.content: SDNA (Sanctuary DNA) - Gnostic agent workflow DSL with skills for chain development

entry.title: klanker
entry.content: Klanker Maker sandbox platform — agent-side email/Slack/operator skills + operator-side init/vscode/desktop/cluster skills

entry.title: context-mode
entry.content: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entry.title: nx-plugin-for-aws
entry.content: Scaffold and build cloud-native applications on AWS using @aws/nx-plugin generators. Covers workspace creation, project scaffolding with TypeScript, Python, React, CDK, Terraform, and more.

entry.title: sidecar
entry.content: Project-agnostic AI coding sidecar — SELF-CONTAINED Claude Code plugin: governance hooks (guards + injects) AND the sidecar CLI itself (bin/ · cli/ · lib/ · modules/ · config/ · templates/ · styles/) ship as ONE unit. Hooks run the plugin's own bundled CLI via ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}, so `/plugin update` + reload refreshes everything together — no per-project copy, no separate `sidecar self-update`. Slash commands ship as BARE `/cmd` via `sidecar shadow` (user-scope ~/.claude/commands), NOT plugin-namespaced — see `commands: []` below. Falls back to a global `sidecar` on PATH when present.

entry.title: nas-llm
entry.content: LLM Wiki Knowledge Base — planning, ops scripts, and E2E checklist for the DESKTOP-AT1P1UD deployment of nashsu/llm_wiki

entry.title: korean-dart
entry.content: OpenDART 83개 API → 15개 MCP 도구. 금융감독원 전자공시(DART) 기반 AI 리서치 — 공시 검색·재무·XBRL + 버핏 애널리스트 프레임(insider_signal · disclosure_anomaly · buffett_quality_snapshot) + HWP/PDF 첨부 마크다운화

entry.title: more-paper-workflow-pro-skill
entry.content: 中文/双语论文的证据闭环学术工作流：从定题、检索、下载、Zotero 到写作与引用审计，全程基于真实文献。

entry.title: lore
entry.content: Share Claude Code and Cowork sessions to Lore and read threads back.

entry.title: audiobook-organizer
entry.content: Expert Claude Code assistance for the audiobook-organizer codebase — shared context loading, Go/DB/docs/PII specialist agents.

entry.title: heavyskill
entry.content: Heavy Thinking as the Inner Skill in Agentic Harness — spawns K independent parallel reasoning agents then performs critical sequential deliberation. Implementation of arXiv:2605.02396v1.

entry.title: agent-rally-point
entry.content: Agent Rally Point — repo-local coordination surface for parallel coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini). Records claims, checks write boundaries, routes handoffs, and exposes room state via the rally CLI. Skills: agent-rally-point (per-session loop), rally-workflows (fan-out + dynamic-workflows protocol), mini-loop (per-task quality gate). Advisory-only hooks auto-fire on SessionStart + PreToolUse to surface room awareness and deconflict before edits — never blocks. Backend: rally CLI (cargo install --path crates/rally-cli).

entry.title: dependabit
entry.content: AI-powered tracker for external informational dependencies. Bootstrap Dependabit in any repo to discover, track, and monitor documentation sites, research papers, API schemas, and reference implementations.

entry.title: claude-patent-creator-standalone
entry.content: Complete self-contained patent creation system - NO MCP server required. Uses Claude Code skills, agents, commands, and hooks.

entry.title: b00t
entry.content: b00t plugin for Claude Code - extreme programming agent framework with datum system, direnv pattern, and DRY philosophy

entry.title: everything-claude-code
entry.content: Complete collection of battle-tested Claude Code configs from an Anthropic hackathon winner - agents, skills, hooks, and rules evolved over 10+ months of intensive daily use

entry.title: vibe-center-skills
entry.content: Vibe Coding Control Center - Custom skills for session management

entry.title: rubio-standards
entry.content: Rubio-Enterprises repository standards

entry.title: zmr
entry.content: Agent-native mobile UI automation and verification for Expo, React Native, Flutter, and native Android/iOS apps. Gives Claude Code eyes and hands on emulators and simulators: semantic snapshots, typed actions, waits, assertions, and replayable traces.

entry.title: kei
entry.content: Kei 言語を学習なしで正しく書くためのスキル。func/契約/エフェクト/型/失敗処理の最小十分セットと、kei check による検証ループを提供する(v0.4: 論理和 || / 剰余 % 演算子対応)。

entry.title: rill
entry.content: Skills for developing and querying projects in the Rill business intelligence platform

entry.title: cinematic-scroll
entry.content: Build cinematic, scroll-driven websites — pinned chapter reveals, multi-depth parallax, 3D tilt, environment-morphing backgrounds, and full release/launch pages. The motion grammar is the skill; the aesthetic is always the user's. Single self-contained scroll sections (Mode A) or a full Next.js release site with GSAP/Lenis + AI-generated visuals (Mode B), via a 5-phase gated pipeline with taste guardrails, 12 scroll patterns, and a transform/opacity performance budget.

entry.title: planwright
entry.content: Autopilot for spec-driven development. The human signs off and merges; planwright flies the spec.

entry.title: rauf
entry.content: Authoring, review, guidance, and loop-operation skills for rauf autonomous coding loops. rauf owns the backlog contract; these skills serve both the repo-wide ad-hoc flow and feature-pipeline tools that delegate to them.

entry.title: happytrails
entry.content: Live browser-based viewer for all agent tool activity with three switchable view modes

entry.title: pure-cognitive-oil
entry.content: Portable cognitive infrastructure for agent harnesses: graph-connected references, bootstrap context, routing, verification gates, and PCO skills.

entry.title: kaizen
entry.content: Multi-agent improvement plugin — runs Atelier's methodology against any git repository by URL

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,651 supported skills.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,326 supported skills.

entry.title: gsd-core
entry.content: GSD Core is a meta-prompting, context engineering, and spec-driven development system for AI coding agents.

entry.title: clickhouse-monitor
entry.content: Specialized assistance for the chmonitor dashboard - a real-time monitoring dashboard for ClickHouse clusters

entry.title: atelier
entry.content: Shared workspace methodology and dev workflow for human-AI development teams

entry.title: gemini-manager
entry.content: Enables Claude Code to manage Gemini CLI as an intern. Claude acts as manager/architect while Gemini does all coding work.

entry.title: exarchos
entry.content: A local-first SDLC workflow harness — structured, durable state for coding agents, with convergence gates, agent teams, and full audit trail.

entry.title: cc-proxy
entry.content: Z.ai and OpenRouter proxy for Claude Code — stateless local router with manual /model switching and per-provider auth.

entry.title: issuesdb-plugin
entry.content: Skills for grooming and working issuesdb issues end-to-end — from triage through PR

entry.title: all-skills
entry.content: Meta-plugin that installs all skills from all plugins in the marketplace

entry.title: e2e-skills
entry.content: AI agent testing toolkit to generate, review, and debug Playwright and Cypress E2E tests. Four agent skills: generate tests from scratch with live browser exploration, explicit user approval, and first-run scaffolding of project testing conventions (AGENTS.md E2E section + seed spec) for consistent AI generation across Claude Code, Codex, and Playwright Agents; review existing specs against 24 anti-patterns grouped by P0/P1/P2 severity — P0 must-fix (name-assertion mismatch, missing Then, error swallowing, Cypress uncaught:exception suppression, always-passing assertions, bypass patterns, focused test leak, missing assertions, missing auth setup, missing await on expect, missing await on action), P1 should-fix (raw DOM queries, hard-coded sleeps, flaky test patterns, inconsistent POM usage, hardcoded credentials, direct page action API, expect.soft overuse, module-level mutable state in test utilities, unmocked real-backend writes, optimistic UI without call proof), P2 nice-to-fix (YAGNI + zombie specs, manually-captured session-file dependency, fixture ignores render guards); debug failed Playwright tests from playwright-report/; debug failed Cypress tests from cypress/reports/. Built for E2E test automation, flaky test root-cause analysis, false-positive detection, and test smell scanning.
